visual_description: A man with dark hair, wearing a maroon shirt and blue jeans, stands in a dimly lit bedroom. He lifts a large axe and swings it forcefully at a white door with glass panels. His face is turned toward the camera, showing a broad smile as he repeatedly strikes the door.
audio_description: The audio captures the thudding impact of the axe on the door and the man's audible laughter.
